hibernate-mapping.sql-query: SELECT ID_REGLA_NEGOCIO AS "idReglaNegocio", ID_TIPO_DESTINO AS "idTipoDestino", CORREO_DESTINO AS "correoDestino", NOMBRE_PERSONA AS "nombrePersona", GRUPO_CORREO AS "grupoCorreo", ESTADO AS "estado", CASE ESTADO WHEN 'A' THEN 'Activo' WHEN 'I' THEN 'Inactivo' END AS "estadoaux" FROM SGALERTASSYS.REGLA_NEGOCIO_DESTINO with (nolock) WHERE ID_REGLA_NEGOCIO = :p_regla
SELECT count(*) FROM SGALERTASSYS.REGLA_NEGOCIO_DESTINO with (nolock) WHERE ID_REGLA_NEGOCIO = :p_regla

SELECT P.PERSONA as "codigo", P.BUSQUEDA as "busqueda", P.DOCUMENTO as "documento", P.CORREOELECTRONICO as "correoelectronico", E.CORREOINTERNO as "correointerno" FROM VW_REMOTO_PersonaMast P with (nolock) LEFT JOIN VW_REMOTO_EmpleadoMast E with (nolock) ON P.PERSONA=E.EMPLEADO WHERE E.ESTADOEMPLEADO = '2' AND UPPER(P.BUSQUEDA) Like '%' || nvl(UPPER(:p_busqueda) , UPPER(P.BUSQUEDA)) || '%' AND P.DOCUMENTO = NVL(:p_documento,P.DOCUMENTO) AND ( P.CORREOELECTRONICO IS NOT NULL OR E.CORREOINTERNO IS NOT NULL) ORDER BY P.BUSQUEDA

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM VW_REMOTO_PersonaMast P with (nolock) LEFT JOIN VW_REMOTO_EmpleadoMast E with (nolock) ON P.PERSONA=E.EMPLEADO WHERE E.ESTADOEMPLEADO = '2' AND UPPER(P.BUSQUEDA) Like '%' || nvl(UPPER(:p_busqueda) , UPPER(P.BUSQUEDA)) || '%' AND P.DOCUMENTO = NVL(:p_documento,P.DOCUMENTO) AND ( P.CORREOELECTRONICO IS NOT NULL OR E.CORREOINTERNO IS NOT NULL) ORDER BY P.BUSQUEDA
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM SGALERTASSYS.REGLA_NEGOCIO_DESTINO rnd with (nolock) WHERE rnd.ID_REGLA_NEGOCIO = :p_regla AND rnd.CORREO_DESTINO = :p_correo
